strict.rationale_for_score: The summary lacks coherence and logical flow, presenting fragmented information. Overall, it fails to capture the essential points of the article.

strict.adjustment_notes: I lowered coherence due to the lack of clear structure and logical flow. Fluency was also reduced because of grammatical issues and awkward phrasing.
